facts.fact: P95 API latency has exceeded the SLO threshold of 250ms continuously for 11 days as of 2024-01-15, triggered by the Q4 schema migration's unindexed join
The Kubernetes cluster upgrade to 1.28 is blocked by a CNI plugin incompatibility that has no upstream fix scheduled; estimated unblock is March at earliest
The database failover drill on 2024-01-10 revealed a 4-minute monitoring blind spot during leader election; alerting does not fire until a new leader is confirmed
Redis cluster memory headroom is at 23% of capacity; at current growth rate, the cluster reaches saturation in approximately 6 weeks without a tier upgrade
